title: Nursery Rhyme. DCLIII. Relics.
content:
Old Sir Simon the king,
        And young Sir Simon the 'squire,
                And old Mrs. Hickabout
                Kicked Mrs. Kickabout
        Round about our coal fire!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. DCLIII. Relics.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
